title: Fermented Gooey Tamarind Ball Pilaf
description: This halal-friendly meal prep dish features fermented tamarind balls and a gooey temper to create a unique Australian flavor profile suitable for breakfast or snack time.
instructions: Heat water in a saucepan. Add tamarind paste and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add fermented tamarind balls into the simmering tamarind juice mixture and let it cool slightly.
In a separate pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Stir in tomato puree until bubbly.
Add rice to the tempered mix and stir well, then add fresh tamarind juice and allow it to cook for 10 minutes.
Combine rice with fermented tamarind balls and serve hot as a meal prep dish.
